title: Mushri
description: Adds mushroom-themed food, new mushroom wood variants, and introduces a quirky civilization of mushroom-folk called the Mushri living in villages.
body:
# (ﾉ´ヮ`)ﾉ*: ･ﾟ✧  MUSHRI  ✧･ﾟ: *ヽ(・∀・ )ﾉ

A lightweight, slightly weird mod that expands the mushroom biome  
and introduces a curious new civilization: the **Mushri** 

What started as a food and wood addon turned into something... stranger (；￣Д￣）

---

## (＾• ω •＾) What's inside?

- A few new food items, all mushroom-based of course
- A new mushroom wood variant — for cozy builds or cursed contraptions
- Slight visual tweaks to the mushroom biome — feels more alive now 

---

## But the real stars...

### ✧ THE MUSHRI ✧



Small, bouncy mushroom folks who live in little villages  
on remote mushroom islands in the deep wilds

They’re peaceful, and they **love** trading  
glowstone dust for strange and useful items ( •̀ ω •́ )✧

Each Mushri may have a profession:
- Miner (digs all day, never blinks)
- Farmer (grows crops, doesn’t talk)
- Blacksmith (probably the one screaming at lava)

---

Built with questionable logic, lots of mushrooms,  
and a deep respect for weird biome energy.  
Hope you enjoy. (シ_ _)シ
